job_posting:
Senior Finance Analyst — Sahyadri Financial Services Pvt. Ltd. (Pune, Maharashtra; hybrid)

Sahyadri is hiring a Senior Finance Analyst to support our SME-lending business. The analyst will own portfolio-level reporting, partner with the risk and product teams on pricing, and present quarterly performance to leadership.

Responsibilities: build and maintain financial models for the lending book, partner with risk on portfolio stress tests, support audit and regulatory submissions to RBI, run the monthly cohort review.
Requirements: CA / MBA Finance / CFA Level II or higher; 5-8 years in NBFC, bank, or financial-services consulting; advanced Excel + SQL; comfort with Tableau or Power BI.

Selection is based strictly on demonstrated skill and job-relevant experience. Sahyadri is an equal-opportunity employer; we welcome applications from candidates of every background, and we provide reasonable accommodations as required under applicable law.

Compensation: ₹22,00,000 – ₹32,00,000 per annum (CTC) inclusive of variable pay, plus Provident Fund, gratuity, group medical cover for self and family, 22 days of paid leave, and a hybrid work policy.
